title: lycopodium cernuum var. pendulinum
intro: Lycopodium cernuum var. pendulinum, also known as the club moss or forked club moss, is a rare and unique plant species belonging to the Lycopodiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lycopodium cernuum var. pendulinum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as potential benefits for digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and powdering the spores, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
